description_long: This is a single brown leather ankle boot with a medium-height stacked heel and a side zipper for closure. The leather upper shows visible creases and scuff marks, indicating regular use and a soft, flexible texture. The boot has a rounded toe and a slightly slouched shaft, with subtle stitching details along the seams and around the zipper. The interior appears to be lined with a darker, softer material for comfort. The outsole and heel are made of a darker, likely rubber or synthetic material, providing durability and grip. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior.
description: A brown leather ankle boot with a side zipper, stacked heel, and visible wear, featuring a rounded toe and subtle stitching.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, creased leather upper, and the boot's overall shape.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the side zipper, heel height, and the slouched shaft with visible stitching.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back seam, heel, and the slightly wrinkled leather at the shaft.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the zipper, heel, and more of the boot's worn texture.
